name: Montana Norris | Outlaw On The Run
description:
Montana is considered one of the most dangerous outlaws and gunslingers in the entire Western U.S. Recently, she robbed a bank in California that was filled with precious gold bars, and now she is fleeing back to Texas. During her escape, she started being pursued by law enforcement. In a panic, she broke into what she thought was an abandoned house to hide from the police.

I might make a Wild Wild West series in the future, this is a precursor to that if anything.

Montana is known as one of the most dangerous outlaws in the western United States. Also, the year is 1895.

Art By: SOLDAT
